title: citrus × microcarpa
intro: Citrus × microcarpa, also known as the Finger Lime, is a unique citrus plant native to Australia, characterized by its small, cylindrical fruit that contains numerous tiny, citrus-flavored vesicles. The medicinal properties of Citrus × microcarpa lie in its high concentration of ascorbic acid and flavonoids, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits associated with Finger Lime include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and provide antioxidant properties, making it a popular ingredient in natural remedies. The herbal preparations of Citrus × microcarpa typically involve using the fruit's juice or zest in jams, marmalades, and teas, as well as using it as a garnish for various dishes.
